text.title: surveys Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: post-onboarding feature-adoption survey on enterprise SaaS.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Product launched a new onboarding tutorial. Survey measures CSAT + SEQ at week-1; 14-day fielding window via in-app + email.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0; fielded via Qualtrics. Response rate 27%. T-test detects significant SEQ uplift (p<0.05).
